name: templestay
description: Repository-level Codex plugin wrapper for the templestay native Claude Code and Codex CLI template.

interface.shortDescription: Repository wrapper for templestay Codex workflows
interface.longDescription: templestay wraps the repository as a Codex plugin while exposing the canonical Codex-native skills, agents, presets, and verification workflow from codex/templestay.
defaultPrompt: Use templestay to plan, execute, verify, and report this repository task.
Run a templestay verification pass after my changes.
Consult Claude read-only for a templestay architecture review.
